tests.name: TSH
tests.notes: Some labs 0,27-4,2 or 0,5-5,0. Primary screening test

tests.name: FT3
tests.notes: Not always ordered. Also reported as pmol/L (range 3,5-6,5)

tests.name: Anti-TPO
tests.notes: Doctor's notes use ΦΤ <150 — different lab assay

ocr_traps.Anti-Tg_garbled: Google reads 'Anti-Tg' as 'Anti-Tj' or 'Anti-T1' — if it's next to Anti-TPO, it's Anti-Tg
ocr_traps.FT4_vs_FT3: Handwriting 4 and 3 confused. FT4 range ~0,7-1,9; FT3 range ~2,3-4,2 — the value itself disambiguates
ocr_traps.TSH_decimal: TSH is typically 0,5-5,0 with two decimals (e.g., 2,18). If you read '218' it's 2,18
ocr_traps.Ab_negative: Antibodies reported as 'Ab (-)' means both Anti-TPO and Anti-Tg are negative
